License.OpenSourceLead: TypeWhisper is open source. Personal use and GPL-compliant open-source use are free. Proprietary use requires a commercial license.
License.UserTypeHint: Tell TypeWhisper which licensing path applies to you.
License.PlanSelectionHint: Everything stays on this page. Pick the plan that matches how you use TypeWhisper.
License.PlanGplDetail: Install and run the GPL version as-is, including personal or internal use.
License.PlanIndividualDetail: Non-GPL terms, procurement, support, or proprietary distribution for one person.
License.PlanTeamDetail: Procurement, support, managed seats, and up to 10 devices.
License.PlanEnterpriseDetail: Company-wide rollout, procurement, and compliance-heavy setups.
License.PersonalUsageCopy: Support development with a supporter license if you'd like a badge and Discord perks. Personal and GPL-compliant OSS use stay free.
License.CommercialExpiredDetail: This device still has a stored commercial activation, but Polar no longer reports it as active.
License.CommercialInactiveDetail: Activate a commercial license if you use TypeWhisper in proprietary or otherwise non-GPL-compliant environments.
License.CommercialActiveDetailFormat: {0}{1} plan is active on this device.
License.CommercialActiveLifetimeDetail: A lifetime commercial license is active on this device.
License.CommercialActiveSubscriptionDeta: A commercial subscription is active on this device.
License.CheckoutHint: Pay-what-you-want starts at the listed price. Checkout opens in your browser.
License.AnyKeyHint: Enter any TypeWhisper key. The app detects whether it is Commercial or Supporter.
License.ManageCommercialHint: Open the Polar customer portal to manage billing or remove the license from this PC.
License.ManageSupporterHint: Manage your supporter purchase or remove it from this PC.
License.CustomerPortalHint: Open Polar to review orders, invoices, and subscription details.
License.SupporterExpiredDetail: This device still has a stored supporter activation, but Polar no longer reports it as active.
License.SupporterInactiveDetail: Supporter licenses unlock the in-app badge and community perks.
License.SupporterPitch: TypeWhisper is free for personal use. Support development if you want a supporter badge and community role.
License.ClaimGitHubSponsorsOnWeb: Claim GitHub Sponsors status on the web
License.DiscordPendingDetail: Finish the browser flow, then refresh the claim status here.
License.DiscordFailedDetail: The Discord claim service returned an error. If this keeps happening, the community claim endpoint may not be available right now.
License.DiscordServiceUnavailableDetail: The Discord claim service could not be reached right now. GitHub Sponsors claiming is a separate web flow above.
License.DiscordUnlinkedDetail: Connect Discord to claim your supporter role in the community server.
Premium.Title: Premium
Premium.Subtitle: Enable Commercial features for correction learning, user dictionaries, snippets, and local cloud folder sync.
Premium.LockedDescription: Premium features are available with a Commercial license, including target-app correction learning and Cloud Folder Sync.
Premium.SupporterRequiresCommercial: Supporter status is active. Premium features require a Commercial license.
Premium.ErrorCommercialRequired: Cloud Folder Sync requires an active Commercial license.
Premium.LearnCorrectionsFromEdits: Learn from edits in target apps
Premium.AutomaticCorrectionLearningDescr: After TypeWhisper pastes plain text, it can learn high-confidence word corrections when you edit that text in the target app.
Premium.CorrectionExamples: Examples: teh -> the, kubernets -> Kubernetes, recieve -> receive
Settings.Title: TypeWhisper — Settings
General.Title: General
General.HotkeyHybridHint: Short press = toggle, long hold = push-to-talk
General.PromptPaletteHint: Opens the AI prompt palette for selected text
General.TranslationHint: Text is translated locally after transcription (~106 MB per language pair)
General.LocalApiHint: Expose the local REST endpoint for integrations and automation.
General.AutostartHint: TypeWhisper starts automatically when you log in to Windows.
Recording.Title: Recording
Models.Title: Transcription Providers
Models.Subtitle: Local and cloud-based speech recognition
Models.AccelerationHint: Applies to local transcription models when they load.
Models.AccelerationRestartRequiredMessag: Restart TypeWhisper to apply this acceleration change.
Models.AccelerationRestartBalloonMessage: TypeWhisper needs to restart to apply local model acceleration. Click to restart.
Models.StorageMissingFormat: Model storage folder does not exist: {0}
Models.StorageUnwritableFormat: Model storage folder is not writable: {0}
Profiles.Title: Profiles
Profiles.SelectProfileHint: Select a profile from the list or create a new one
Profiles.Name: Name
Profiles.ProcessNameHint: Enter process names and press Enter, or use Live Context for the current app.
Profiles.UrlPatternHint: Enter URL patterns and press Enter (e.g. slack.com, *.github.com)
Profiles.TaskHint: Choose when this profile should transcribe normally or translate instead.
Profiles.TranslationOverrideHint: Overrides the global translation setting for this profile
Profiles.WhisperModeOverrideHint: Overrides the global Whisper Mode setting
Profiles.TranscriptionModelHint: Overrides the global model for this profile (local or cloud)
Profiles.HotkeyHint: Dedicated hotkey to start dictation with this profile (bypasses app matching)
Profiles.LiveContextHint: See what TypeWhisper is matching right now and turn it into rules quickly.
Profiles.LiveContextNoProfileHint: Select a profile first to apply the current app or URL as a rule.
Profiles.PriorityHint: Higher number = higher priority on multiple matches
Profiles.ActionsHint: Duplicate this setup for a similar app, or remove it when you no longer need it.
Profiles.SaveHint: Save once after changing rules, overrides, or activation.
History.Title: History
Plugins.Title: Extensions
Plugins.Subtitle: Plugins extend TypeWhisper with additional transcription engines, AI providers, and post-processing.
Plugins.NoPluginsHint: Install plugins via the Marketplace tab.
Plugins.MarketplaceDescription: Available extensions to download and install.
Dictionary.Title: Dictionary
Dictionary.BoostingHint: Improves recognition of active dictionary terms and packs for local transcriptions
Dictionary.BoostingNoTerms: No active terms available for boosting
Dictionary.EmptySubtitle: Add terms and corrections or enable a pack
Dictionary.EmptyTermsSubtitle: Add technical terms so Whisper recognizes them
Dictionary.EmptyCorrectionsSubtitle: Edit a history entry or add a correction
Dictionary.PacksDescription: Packs add specialized terminology so speech recognition better understands domain vocabulary.
Prompts.Title: Prompts
Prompts.Subtitle: AI prompts for the Prompt Palette. Select text + hotkey = AI processes the text.
Prompts.NoLlmProviderHint: Enable a local provider like Gemma or Ollama, or a cloud provider, in Integrations.
Prompts.ProviderHint: Leave this on the default route unless this prompt should always use a specific model.
Prompts.EmptySubtitle: Create focused post-processing actions for rewrite, summarize, translate, or custom AI workflows.
Snippets.Title: Snippets
Snippets.Subtitle: Placeholders: {date}, {time}, {datetime}, {day}, {year}, {clipboard}, {date:FORMAT}
Snippets.EmptySubtitle: Create short triggers that expand into longer text automatically after transcription.
Snippets.Hint: Double-click a row to edit it. Use tags to keep reusable phrases organized.
Dashboard.Title: Dashboard
Dashboard.Subtitle: Your usage, recent activity, and the quickest path back into dictation.
Dashboard.StatisticsHint: Switch the time range to compare your writing activity.
Dashboard.WizardDesc: Re-run the initial setup to configure model, microphone and hotkeys.
Dashboard.DevSeedDescription: Clear core dev data and load sample settings, history, dictionary entries, snippets, and workflows.
Dashboard.DevSeedConfirm: Clear current development settings, history, dictionary entries, snippets, and workflows, then load sample data?
Dashboard.DevSeedSuccess: Development data was cleared and seeded.
Dashboard.DevSeedUnavailable: Development seeding is only available in dev builds.
Page.DashboardSubtitle: Health, activity, and the quickest path back into the app.
Page.DictationSubtitle: Engines, capture behavior, microphone controls, and translation defaults.
Page.ShortcutsSubtitle: Keyboard-first control over dictation, hold, toggle, and prompt actions.
Page.FileTranscriptionSubtitle: Transcribe audio or video files without leaving the settings shell.
Page.RecorderSubtitle: A dedicated recorder for longer takes and one-off captures.
Page.HistorySubtitle: Review, search, and refine your transcription timeline.
Page.DictionarySubtitle: Corrections, packs, and reusable term quality improvements.
Page.SnippetsSubtitle: Fast reusable insertions and placeholder-driven expansions.
Page.WorkflowsSubtitle: Workflow automation for apps, websites, hotkeys, AI behavior, and output routing.
Page.ProfilesSubtitle: Context-aware overrides by app, website, and workflow.
Page.PromptsSubtitle: Prompt actions and default AI provider for post-processing.
Page.IntegrationsSubtitle: Installed plugins, marketplace updates, and provider setup.
Page.GeneralSubtitle: App-wide language, startup, and service controls.
Page.AppearanceSubtitle: Overlay layout, widget composition, and indicator previews.
Page.AdvancedSubtitle: Memory, retention, unloading, and diagnostic behavior.
Page.PremiumSubtitle: Commercial features for syncing user-authored dictionaries and snippets.
Dictation.LanguageHintsSupport: Selected languages are used in this order when the active engine supports language hints. Other engines use the first language.
Dictation.ShortQuietAggressive: Transcribe short / quiet clips more aggressively
Dictation.ShortQuietAggressiveHint: Still discards accidental ultra-short taps, but keeps more very short or quiet recordings.
Dictation.NormalizeNumbersHint: Converts spoken numbers like twenty three or dreiundzwanzig into digits before insertion and export.
Shortcuts.Subtitle: Keep capture keyboard-first. Start with one main hotkey, then add dedicated variants only when you really need them.
Shortcuts.MainHotkeyHint: Short press toggles recording. Hold the same shortcut for push-to-talk.
Shortcuts.ToggleOnlyHint: Start and stop dictation with a dedicated shortcut.
Shortcuts.RecentTranscriptionsHint: Open a searchable list of your latest transcriptions and insert one into the focused app.
Shortcuts.CopyLastTranscriptionHint: Copy your latest transcription to the clipboard.
Shortcuts.WorkflowPaletteHint: Open manual workflows for selected text or the current clipboard.
Shortcuts.RecorderToggleHint: Start or stop the audio recorder without changing dictation.
Shortcuts.PromptPaletteHint: Open the AI prompt palette without starting dictation.
Shortcuts.ValidationDuplicateFormat: {0} is already assigned to another shortcut.
Shortcuts.ValidationModifierOnlyHold: Modifier-only shortcuts cannot be used for hold-only dictation.
Appearance.StyleStatusIslandHint: Current default with widgets and live text expanding around the status row.
Appearance.StyleEdgeDockHint: Screen-edge strip with widgets and live text anchored away from the edge.
Appearance.StyleCompactBadgeHint: Small centered status light, without widgets or live text expansion.
Appearance.LivePreviewHint: Generates live transcription updates for the separate Live Transcript plugin. The recording overlay itself stays text-free.
Appearance.OnlineAsrBatchLivePreviewHint: Run repeated online transcription calls for the Live Transcript plugin when a provider has no real-time streaming.
Appearance.PreviewLiveSample: Live preview follows your selected indicator style and widgets.
Appearance.PreviewHint: Island and Edge keep shared widgets; Compact keeps only status plus the optional right widget.
Advanced.MemoryHint: Automatically extracts facts from transcriptions with the configured AI provider and injects them into prompt context.
Advanced.RecordingHint: Local models can be unloaded after inactivity, and spoken feedback reads the final transcription aloud.
Advanced.DataHint: When history is disabled, transcriptions are still inserted but not stored.
Advanced.ApiRequireTokenHint: Protect local API requests with the token published in api-discovery.json.
Advanced.ApiNotRunning: API server enabled, but not running
Advanced.ApiHint: Advanced automation interface for local tools. The server listens on localhost only.
Advanced.CliHint: Installs the typewhisper command into your user profile and adds that folder to your user PATH for new terminal sessions.
Recorder.Description: Record microphone, system audio, or both, then optionally save a transcript next to the audio.
Recorder.SourcesHint: Choose what should be captured for this recording.
Recorder.SystemAudioHint: Capture audio from Windows output or a virtual mix.
Recorder.SystemAudioOutputHint: Pick the output device or virtual mix that carries the sound you want.
Recorder.OutputHint: Decide how the audio file is written and how the transcript should be produced.
Recorder.FormatHint: WAV is lossless and fastest. M4A creates smaller files when the encoder is available.
Recorder.TracksHint: Mixed writes one combined file. Separate keeps mic left and system right.
Recorder.DuckingHint: Lowers system audio while you speak to keep the voice readable.
Recorder.TranscriptionHint: Create text automatically after recording finishes.
Recorder.ModeHint: Use dictation text as-is, or translate it with your current language settings.
Recorder.CaptureHint: Start or stop the session. The timer and status update while the recorder works.
Recorder.RecordingsHint: Recent files are saved in the TypeWhisper recordings folder.
Recorder.SelectAtLeastOneSource: Select at least one audio source.
Recorder.M4AEncoderUnavailable: M4A encoding is unavailable on this Windows installation.
Recorder.SystemAudioSilentWarning: System audio is enabled, but no signal is being captured.
Info.Subtitle: Speech-to-text for your Windows desktop
Info.PoweredBy: Works with local and cloud transcription engines
Status.CancelRecordingConfirm: Press Esc again to cancel recording
Status.CancelTranscriptionConfirm: Press Esc again to cancel transcription
RecentTranscriptions.Title: Recent Transcriptions
WorkflowPalette.Title: Workflow Palette
WorkflowPalette.NoText: No selected text or clipboard text available
Update.UpToDate: You are using the latest version.
Update.NoUpdateMessage: You already have the latest version.
Update.ChannelReleaseCandidateDescriptio: Release Candidate follows RC preview builds.
Update.ChannelDailyDescription: Daily follows the latest daily preview builds.
FileTranscription.Title: TypeWhisper - File Transcription
FileTranscription.Formats: WAV, MP3, M4A, FLAC, MP4, MOV
FileTranscription.SubtitleUnavailable: Subtitle export requires timestamped segments from the selected model.
WatchFolder.Title: Watch folder
WatchFolder.Description: New supported files are transcribed into the selected output format.
SnippetEditor.Title: Edit Snippet
SnippetEditor.Subtitle: Build reusable expansions for common phrases, signatures, and structured text.
SnippetEditor.TriggerHint: Keep it short and memorable, for example sig or intro.
SnippetEditor.TagsHint: Optional, for example email, support, or german.
Welcome.Title: Welcome to TypeWhisper
Welcome.Subtitle: Speech-to-Text Transcription
Welcome.Step1Desc: Choose a transcription model first, then install any extra providers you want.
Welcome.IndustryDesc: Choose your main work context so TypeWhisper can prepare the right dictionary vocabulary.
Welcome.IndustryLicenseHint: Industry term packs are activated automatically when a commercial license is active. Workflows can use the same choice later.
IndustryPreset.general.Name: General writing
IndustryPreset.real-estate.Name: Real estate
IndustryPreset.architecture.Name: Architecture
IndustryPreset.legal.Name: Legal
Welcome.NoModels: Install a transcription extension first to select a model.
Welcome.LocalRecommendationDesc: Offline on your PC. No API key.
Welcome.CloudRecommendationDesc: Fast cloud transcription. API key required.
Welcome.SelectedModelConfigurationHint: Enter the provider API key before activating this cloud model.
Welcome.SelectedModelConfigurationHintFo: Enter your {0} API key before activating this cloud model.
Welcome.Step2Desc: Say something and check if the level bar reacts.
Welcome.MicLevelHint: Speak normally and watch for the bar to move.
Welcome.Step3Desc: Set the main dictation hotkey. Short press toggles recording, holding the same shortcut uses push-to-talk.
Welcome.AdvancedHotkeysHint: Need more shortcuts later? Configure toggle-only, hold-only, and the workflow palette in Settings > Shortcuts.
Welcome.Step4Desc: Use your new hotkey once to make sure everything works end to end.
Welcome.TrialBlockedTitle: One more thing before the test
Welcome.TrialNoEngineReady: No transcription engine is ready yet. Go back and finish the model setup first.
Welcome.TrialNoHotkey: No hotkey is configured yet. Go back and assign your main dictation hotkey first.
Welcome.TrialInstruction: Click the field below, then press your hotkey and say something.
Welcome.TrialClipboardHint: Auto paste is disabled, so the result may land in your clipboard instead of directly in this box.
Welcome.AllSetDesc: TypeWhisper is ready to use in any app.
Hotkey.ModifierOnlyHint: Modifier-only shortcuts trigger on release and stay available in longer key combinations. Win alone is reserved, and modifier-only shortcuts cannot be used for hold-only dictation.
Prompts.EditorSubtitle: Keep prompts focused and reusable. You can change ordering later from the list.
Workflows.Title: Workflows
Workflows.Subtitle: Create app, website, and hotkey-triggered automation from one surface.
Workflows.EmptySubtitle: Start with a concrete outcome, choose exactly one trigger, and TypeWhisper will run it when that context matches.
Workflows.Name: Name
Workflows.TemplateHint: Choose the concrete result this workflow should produce.
Workflows.TriggerHint: Choose whether this workflow runs automatically, always as a fallback, or only from the workflow palette.
Workflows.TriggerAutomaticHint: Enable one or more automatic trigger components. App + Website rules win before website-only, app-only, and Always.
Workflows.TriggerAlwaysHint: Use this workflow as a global fallback when no website or app workflow matches.
Workflows.TriggerManualHint: Show this workflow in the workflow palette for selected or copied text. It never runs automatically.
Workflows.DefaultAiProviderHint: Used by workflows set to the default route.
Workflows.AiRoutingHint: Edits already recognized text: rewriting, summaries, translations, or custom instructions.
Workflows.SpeechRecognitionHint: For the language you speak. By default, the global recognition setting applies.
Workflows.EngineTaskHint: This is audio-level translation for engines that support it. Workflow Translation is separate AI/post-processing.
Workflows.EngineTaskUnavailable: The selected speech model only supports transcription.
Workflows.HotkeyBehaviorStartDictationHi: Pressing the shortcut starts recording and applies this workflow to the dictation.
Workflows.HotkeyBehaviorProcessSelectedT: Pressing the shortcut transforms the current selection or clipboard without recording.
Workflows.NumberFormattingHint: Controls whether spoken numbers are converted to digits for this workflow.
Workflows.DomainPickerHint: Use the current browser domain or pick one from recent workflow/history context.
Workflows.DomainPickerEmpty: Paste a URL or domain above to add a website trigger.
Workflows.ValidationAutomatic: Enable at least one automatic trigger.
Workflows.ValidationApp: Add at least one app process name.
Workflows.ValidationWebsite: Add at least one website or domain.
Workflows.ValidationTranslation: Translation workflows need a target language.
Update.BalloonMessage: Version {0} is available. Click here to update.
Update.BalloonFailedMessage: The update could not be installed. Please try again later.
Error.NoLlmProvider: No AI provider available. Configure a local or cloud provider in Integrations.
